panels.title: fix(api): fold start-trial into payment.ts, drop onboarding.ts
panels.scene: Knight meticulously folds a tiny scroll labeled 'start-trial' into a larger scroll labeled 'payment.ts'. He then drops a HUGE scroll labeled 'onboarding.ts' into a fiery pit. Villagers watch in awe and terror.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He consolidated the scrolls of power! But... what becomes of onboarding.ts?

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Reduced code complexity. 1 less file to maintain.

panels.title: feat(onboarding): add all 22 step components
panels.scene: Villagers stare in wide-eyed horror as 22 identical, tiny stick figures with question marks on their faces march into the village, each carrying a tiny scroll. The knight looks on, unamused.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: 22 steps! Will we ever escape onboarding?

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Each component represents a step in the onboarding funnel.

panels.title: spike: live Dodo trial run results
panels.scene: A graph showing Dodo trial results is projected onto the sky, causing mass hysteria. The graph is mostly flat, with a tiny blip upwards. Villagers are either celebrating wildly or weeping dramatically, pointing at the blip. The knight is holding a small Dodo bird, unimpressed.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The Dodo lives! The trial run was a success!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was a preliminary test. The results are inconclusive.

panels.title: 29 commits. 2 fixes. 13 features. 1 spike. 0 Dodos extinct.
panels.scene: The Knight is sitting on a stone bench, polishing his sword. In the background, villagers are unveiling a giant golden statue of a Dodo bird wearing a tiny graduation cap. A villager is naming their baby 'Funnel'.
